name: autoscreen
description: AI-native visual UI review for coding agents. Screenshot live pages gated on real data, not timeouts.

interface.shortDescription: Screenshot live pages after real data loads.
interface.longDescription: AutoScreen gives coding agents an on-demand visual UI review loop. It navigates to a live page, waits for ready-state data-testid markers, and returns a screenshot for review.
defaultPrompt: Review the UI after my latest frontend changes
Capture the market lens once it reaches a ready state
